_note: Local changelog rendered by whats-new.html. No network fetch — privacy-first.

entries.title: Onboarding, backups & polish
changes: Added a first-run welcome tour: pick a language and theme, turn on fast-food and delivery blocking, and optionally import settings.
Added Backup & Restore — export every setting to a single JSON file and import it on another device. Fully local.
Added this What's New page, shown only when the version changes.
Listed FitShield on the Chrome Web Store for one-click installs.
Removed unused code and consolidated the language list into a shared module.

entries.title: Recipe suggestions & blocking fixes
changes: The block page now suggests a vegetarian and a meat/protein recipe based on what you blocked.
Fixed an international domain in the blocklist that was silently disabling all blocking.
Made the block screen reliably appear and show which brand triggered it.

entries.title: Localization
changes: Added 80+ display languages with a searchable language picker and a manual override.
Moved all interface text into the standard Chrome localization system.
